Committee: Tourism, Parks, Arts And Sports Development

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO TOURISM, PARKS, ARTS AND SPORTS DEVELOPMENT

Title: Makes free one day admission to the zoological park permanent; repealer
Summary: Makes free one day admission to the zoological park permanent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 383 of the laws of 1991, relating to the incorporation of the New York Zoological Society, in relation to making free one day admission to the zoological park permanent; and repealing certain provisions of such law relating thereto
